title: Configuration Types
description: Project settings, plugin configuration, and delivery configuration types.

ArtifactTypeConfig.title: ArtifactTypeConfig
ArtifactTypeConfig.description: A single artifact type with a filesystem path to scan.

key.description: Artifact type key matching platform artifact types.

path.description: Relative directory path within .orqa/ to scan for this type.

ArtifactEntry.title: ArtifactEntry
ArtifactEntry.description: An entry in the artifacts config — either a direct type or a group of types.

oneOf.title: ArtifactGroup
oneOf.description: A grouped collection of artifact types.

DeliveryParentConfig.title: DeliveryParentConfig
DeliveryParentConfig.description: The parent relationship config for a delivery type.

relationship.description: Relationship type connecting child to parent.

DeliveryTypeConfig.title: DeliveryTypeConfig
DeliveryTypeConfig.description: A single delivery type defined in project.json.

path.description: Relative directory path within .orqa/ for this delivery type.

gate_field.description: Frontmatter field used as the gate condition for status promotion.

DeliveryConfig.title: DeliveryConfig
DeliveryConfig.description: The delivery configuration block from project.json.

types.description: Ordered list of delivery type definitions.

ProjectRelationshipConfig.title: ProjectRelationshipConfig
ProjectRelationshipConfig.description: A project-level relationship type defined in project.json.

label.description: Human-readable label for the forward direction.

inverse_label.description: Human-readable label for the inverse direction.

ChildProjectConfig.title: ChildProjectConfig
ChildProjectConfig.description: A child project reference in an organisation-mode project.

name.description: Logical name for this child project.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the child project root.

StatusDefinition.title: StatusDefinition
StatusDefinition.description: A status definition loaded from project.json.

spin.description: Whether to animate the icon with a spin effect.

transitions.description: Valid next status keys from this status.

PluginProjectConfig.title: PluginProjectConfig
PluginProjectConfig.description: Per-plugin configuration stored in project.json under 'plugins.<name>'.

installed.description: Whether the plugin has been installed.

enabled.description: Whether the plugin is currently active.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the plugin root.

relationships.description: Map of relationship key → enabled boolean for plugin-provided relationships.

organisation.description: Whether this is an organisation-mode project with child projects.

projects.description: Child project references (only used when organisation is true).

statuses.description: Valid status definitions for this project.

relationships.description: Project-level relationship types beyond the core platform relationships.

plugins.description: Plugin configurations keyed by plugin name.
